title: Behind the Scenes - Introduction to Artificial Intelligence with Brian Yu - Chapter 1 - Playing
summary: CS50 is Harvard University's introductory computer science course offered through edX, Harvard Extension School, Harvard Summer School, and OpenCourseWare. The series features educational content on artificial intelligence and programming, with this episode presenting Chapter 1 on playing games with instructor Brian Yu. The course maintains active communities across numerous platforms including Discord, GitHub, and social media channels.
writeup: This CS50 chapter, led by Brian Yu, introduces foundational AI concepts with a focus on game-playing AI. It sits within Harvard's introduction to computer science and programming, distributed through edX, Harvard Extension School, Harvard Summer School, and OpenCourseWare. Listed concepts include game-playing, vector search, and generative AI.
